text.title: AI Agent Patterns Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from task brief to validated decision record.

step.name: classify-task
step.input: Task brief; tool inventory; latency budget.
step.action: Answer three questions in writing: needs_tools (bool), step_count (int), branching (bool).

step.name: pick-pattern
step.action: Apply decision tree (content/06-decision-tree.xml): no tools → CoT; tools + ≤5 steps + no branching → ReAct; tools + >5 steps OR branching → Plan-and-Execute; framework-mandated → Tool Use.

step.name: pick-framework
step.input: chosen_pattern; team experience matrix; dependency budget.
step.action: Map pattern to framework given team familiarity: simple ReAct/CoT → raw SDK; graph/state-machine → LangGraph; multi-agent debate → AutoGen; role-based crew → CrewAI; OpenAI-only stack → OpenAI Agents SDK; coding/devops headless → Claude Code.
step.decision-gate: If team experience matrix shows 0 familiarity with chosen_framework, downgrade to raw-sdk + roll-your-own.

step.name: define-tools-and-caps
step.action: For each tool, write name + ≥30-char description + JSON schema with required fields. Set caps.max_steps=15 (default), loop_detect=true.

step.name: emit-record-and-flag
step.action: Compose decision record per content/02-output-contract.xml. Add comment to the top of the agent implementation file with chosen_pattern + chosen_framework + framework_pin. Ship behind a feature flag for one daily cycle.
